name: Verified User in Marketing and Advertising
one_line_review: "Excellent and User Friendly Functionality - Team Can't be Beat!"
detailed_review:
What do you like best about Synup?

The platform is user-friendly and easy to navigate. On top of that, our CSM is responsive, helpful, and just an overall pleasure to work with.

‍

What do you dislike about Synup?

Not a downside necessarily - but the interface isn't shiny or flashy. Very clean and straightforward design but can leave something to be desired when sharing with clients, etc.

‍

What problems is Synup solving and how is that benefiting you?

Synup makes listing management, reputation management, and bulk posting an absolute breeze. It has been one of the most seamless onboardings l've ever experienced with a listing tool and saves our internal team a ton of time and hours.

seo.title: Verified User in Marketing and Advertising
